title: Route des Grandes Alpes
cinematic_pitch: High-altitude technical strike. 700km of pure alpine gravity. Execution requires 100% focus from insertion to extraction.
highlights: Col de l'Iseran: Tactical summit at 2,770m. Thin air. Technical hairpins.
Col de la Bonette: Strategic apex of Europe. Zero margin for error.
Geneva to Nice: Total theater dominance. 17 major passes.
